examples: It has pitched what it is calling the L-2 Farside Mission Orion spacecraft to do the job, which would house both astronauts and probes.
There are proposals for doing radio astronomy from the lunar farside, which will probe the dark ages of the Universe and look back to when the first stars turned on.
Should Lockheed’s plan be approved by NASA the company needs to first build a heavy lifter machine and, assuming that happens, an L2-Farside mission could take place as early as 2016.
